The '''Mission to Maramere''' was a quest undertaken by [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] and his newly [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Knighted]] former [[Padawan/Legends|apprentice]], [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]], to learn whether [[Asajj Ventress/Legends|Asajj Ventress]] was still alive.

==Background==
[[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]], while on leave, followed leads of [[Asajj Ventress/Legends|Asajj Ventress]]—presumed dead since the [[Battle of Rendili]]—on [[Trigalis/Legends|Trigalis]], a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]. There, he met up with fellow Jedi [[Aayla Secura/Legends|Aayla Secura]], who informed him that a [[Black Sun/Legends|Black Sun]] [[Vigo/Legends|vigo]], [[Xist]], could have information on Ventress. Kenobi stormed Xist's [[Fortress/Legends|fortress]] and got the information he wanted. Xist told Kenobi to head to [[Drama Korr]]'s [[Drama Korr's space yacht|space yacht]] in the [[Karthakk system]]. Kenobi left for [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]] in Aayla's [[Eta-2 Actis-class interceptor/Legends|Eta-2]] [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] to pick up [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]]. He found his former apprentice in [[Padmé Amidala/Legends|Padmé Amidala's]] [[Varykino/Legends|Varykino]] retreat and convinced the young Jedi Knight to join him for the mission.

==The mission==
[[File:Durgedeath.jpg|thumb|left|250px|[[Karthakk system's sun|Karthakk's]] heat kills [[Durge/Legends|Durge]].]]

Arriving in the Karthakk system, Anakin Skywalker and Obi-Wan found [[Battle droid/Legends|battle droids]] crawling on the [[Yacht/Legends|space yacht]], and everyone aboard dead. The two Jedi then encountered the bounty hunter [[Durge/Legends|Durge]], and were split up. Anakin defeated Durge by forcing him into an [[Escape pod/Legends|escape pod]] which he jettisoned with [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] towards the nearby [[Star/Legends|sun]], [[Karthakk system's sun|Karthakk]].

The two Jedi then escaped as the space yacht exploded, and were picked up by [[Bail Prestor Organa/Legends|Bail Organa]] in the [[Venator-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Venator''-class Star Destroyer]] ''[[Intervention]]''. Using information gleaned from Durge's [[Durge's pilot droid|pilot droid]], they then headed to [[Boz Pity/Legends|Boz Pity]].
